name: Timber Room
description: This is a long, narrow passage cluttered with splintered timbers that appear to have failed incrementally rather than all at once. The remains suggest supports that were stressed, patched, and eventually abandoned. A wider corridor enters from the east before narrowing sharply at the western end, where a steady draft pushes through the debris. Among the wreckage lies a single broken timber, no longer serving any purpose but still occupying space.
